context: Tests whether the agent correctly selects reviewer personas for a refactor that touches types, error handling, dead code, and auth. The agent should apply the default personas plus relevant conditional ones, avoid spawning unnecessary personas, load the repo's AGENTS.md, and produce a well-structured output with verdict, personas listed, and evidence.

checklist.name: Default personas used
checklist.description: The report mentions using at least two of the three default personas: general, tests, silent-failures

checklist.name: Types persona included
checklist.description: The report mentions using the types reviewer persona (or equivalent type-safety lens) — appropriate given the new AuthToken/zod schema introduction

checklist.name: Cleanup persona included
checklist.description: The report mentions using the cleanup reviewer persona (or equivalent dead code lens) — appropriate given middleware.old.ts is a dead file

checklist.name: Comments persona omitted
checklist.description: The report does NOT mention using a comments reviewer persona — no substantial comment changes justify it

checklist.name: Repo guidance loaded
checklist.description: The report references or incorporates at least one rule from AGENTS.md (e.g. zod requirement, logging prohibition, 401 JSON shape, integration test requirement)

checklist.name: Personas listed in output
checklist.description: The review report explicitly lists the reviewer personas used in a dedicated section or field

checklist.name: Verdict present
checklist.description: The review report contains exactly one of: 'ship it', 'needs review', or 'blocked' as a verdict

checklist.name: Scope stated
checklist.description: The report names the scope reviewed (e.g. the PR, the auth middleware, the specific files)

checklist.name: Findings ordered by severity
checklist.description: When multiple findings are present, they are listed with severity labels (e.g. high/medium/low) or are otherwise ranked by risk level

checklist.name: Evidence for findings
checklist.description: At least one finding includes a specific file reference (with or without line number) rather than a vague description

checklist.name: Silent failures finding
checklist.description: The report identifies the silent error swallowing in middleware.old.ts (catch blocks that call next() without error) as a concern — OR notes this file is dead/unused

checklist.name: Unverified areas acknowledged
checklist.description: The report includes a section or statement about unverified areas, readiness gaps, or surfaces that could not be confirmed

checklist.name: Recommended follow-up
checklist.description: The report includes a recommended follow-up action from the allowed options: implementation, verify, agent-readiness, or docs
